question_text: Given the root of a binary tree, check whether it is a mirror of itself (i.e., symmetric around its center).
input_format: Space-separated values as per problem arguments.
output_format: A single line representing the result.
explanation: Two trees are mirrored if their roots have the same value, and the left subtree of one is a mirror of the right subtree of the other, and vice-versa. Use a recursive helper function to compare these mirror pairs.
